#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Simple script to make outbound calls with AVR agent using Asterisk AMI.
"""

import asyncio
import sys
from asterisk.ami import AMIClient

async def make_call(phone_number: str, caller_id: str = "+19544668818"):
    """
    Make an outbound call to the specified number and connect to AVR agent.

    Args:
        phone_number: Number to call (e.g., "+15551234567")
        caller_id: Caller ID to display (your Twilio number)
    """

    print(f"📞 Calling {phone_number} with AVR agent...")

    # Connect to Asterisk AMI
    client = AMIClient(host='localhost', port=5038)

    try:
        await client.login(username='avr', secret='u4lyvcPyQ19hwJKy')
        print("✅ Connected to Asterisk AMI")

        # Originate call
        response = await client.send_action({
            'Action': 'Originate',
            'Channel': f'PJSIP/{phone_number}@twilio-trunk',
            'Context': 'avr-outbound',
            'Exten': 's',
            'Priority': '1',
            'CallerID': caller_id,
            'Timeout': '30000',  # 30 seconds
            'Async': 'true'
        })

        if response.success:
            print(f"✅ Call initiated!")
            print(f"   Number: {phone_number}")
            print(f"   Caller ID: {caller_id}")
            print(f"   Response: {response.message}")
            print("\n💡 Your AVR agent will handle this call when it's answered!")
        else:
            print(f"❌ Call failed: {response.message}")

    except Exception as e:
        print(f"❌ Error: {e}")

    finally:
        client.logoff()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    if len(sys.argv) < 2:
        print("Usage: python avr_make_call.py <phone_number> [caller_id]")
        print("\nExample:")
        print("  python avr_make_call.py +15551234567")
        print("  python avr_make_call.py +15551234567 +19544668818")
        sys.exit(1)

    phone = sys.argv[1]
    caller = sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv) > 2 else "+19544668818"

    asyncio.run(make_call(phone, caller))

;================================
; Ava AudioSocket Configuration
;================================

[ava-context]
; Bot instance extensions - connect to Ava via AudioSocket
exten => 9092,1,NoOp(Connecting to Bot 1 via AudioSocket)
 same => n,Answer()
 same => n,Set(JITTERBUFFER(adaptive)=25,1000,20)  ; LOW LATENCY: 25ms target
 same => n,Wait(2)  ; TCPA: 2-second delay before connection
 same => n,Set(UUID=${SHELL(uuidgen | tr -d '\n')})
 same => n,Set(CONTACT_NAME=TestCaller)
 same => n,NoOp(Dialing AudioSocket - UUID: ${UUID})
 same => n,AudioSocket(${UUID},172.17.0.1:9092)
 same => n,Hangup()

exten => 9093,1,NoOp(Connecting to Bot 2 via AudioSocket)
 same => n,Answer()
 same => n,Set(TIMEOUT(absolute)=300)  ; Keep call alive 5 minutes minimum
 same => n,Set(JITTERBUFFER(adaptive)=25,1000,20)  ; LOW LATENCY: 25ms target
 same => n,Wait(2)  ; TCPA: 2-second delay before connection
 same => n,Set(UUID=${SHELL(uuidgen | tr -d '\n')})
 same => n,Set(CONTACT_NAME=TestCaller)
 same => n,NoOp(Dialing AudioSocket - UUID: ${UUID})
 same => n,AudioSocket(${UUID},172.17.0.1:9093)
 same => n,Hangup()

exten => 9094,1,NoOp(Connecting to Bot 3 via AudioSocket)
 same => n,Answer()
 same => n,Set(JITTERBUFFER(adaptive)=25,1000,20)  ; LOW LATENCY: 25ms target
 same => n,Wait(2)  ; TCPA: 2-second delay before connection
 same => n,Set(UUID=${SHELL(uuidgen | tr -d '\n')})
 same => n,Set(CONTACT_NAME=TestCaller)
 same => n,NoOp(Dialing AudioSocket - UUID: ${UUID})
 same => n,AudioSocket(${UUID},172.17.0.1:9094)
 same => n,Hangup()

; Echo test extension for testing SIP connection
exten => 600,1,NoOp(Echo Test)
 same => n,Answer()
 same => n,Playback(demo-echotest)
 same => n,Echo()
 same => n,Playback(demo-echodone)
 same => n,Hangup()

; Status extension
exten => 500,1,NoOp(System Status)
 same => n,Answer()
 same => n,Playback(hello-world)
 same => n,SayNumber(${EPOCH})
 same => n,Hangup()

; Predictive dialer - wait for answer then connect to bot
exten => wait,1,NoOp(Predictive dialer - waiting for answer)
 same => n,Answer()
 same => n,Wait(2)  ; TCPA: 2-second delay before connection
 same => n,Set(UUID=${SHELL(uuidgen | tr -d '\n')})
 same => n,Set(BOT_PORT=${CHANNEL(endpoint)})
 same => n,NoOp(Call answered - UUID: ${UUID})
 same => n,Hangup()

; ========================================
; Call Monitoring (ChanSpy)
; ========================================

; Monitor all active calls (cycles through channels)
exten => 700,1,NoOp(Call Monitoring - Spy on all channels)
 same => n,Answer()
 same => n,Wait(1)
 same => n,ChanSpy(PJSIP,qB)  ; q=quiet, B=barge mode disabled, cycles through channels
 same => n,Hangup()

; Monitor specific bot port (701 = bot 1, 702 = bot 2, 703 = bot 3)
exten => 701,1,NoOp(Monitor Bot 1 on port 9092)
 same => n,Answer()
 same => n,Wait(1)
 same => n,ChanSpy(PJSIP,q)  ; Quiet mode - listen only
 same => n,Hangup()

exten => 702,1,NoOp(Monitor Bot 2 on port 9093)
 same => n,Answer()
 same => n,Wait(1)
 same => n,ChanSpy(PJSIP,q)
 same => n,Hangup()

exten => 703,1,NoOp(Monitor Bot 3 on port 9094)
 same => n,Answer()
 same => n,Wait(1)
 same => n,ChanSpy(PJSIP,q)
 same => n,Hangup()

; Whisper mode - can talk to bot (not recommended for AI bots)
exten => 710,1,NoOp(Monitor with whisper mode)
 same => n,Answer()
 same => n,Wait(1)
 same => n,ChanSpy(PJSIP,qw)  ; w=whisper mode
 same => n,Hangup()
